nasb.text: They put forward false witnesses who said, “This man incessantly speaks against this holy place and the Law;

esv.text: and they set up false witnesses who said, “This man never ceases to speak words against this holy place and the law,

cnv.text: 並且造了假的證供說：“這人不斷抨擊聖地和律法。

ccb.text: 他们还派人作伪证说：“司提凡常常讲侮辱圣地和律法的话。

csbs.text: 并且推出假见证人说：“这个人不断地说亵渎神的话语，反对这圣所和律法。
